mapper.select: select id, agent_id as agentId, session_name as sessionName, last_message_at as lastMessageAt, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, status, reserver, remark from agent_chat_session where id = #{id} for update

select id, agent_id as agentId, session_name as sessionName, last_message_at as lastMessageAt, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, status, reserver, remark from agent_chat_session where agent_id = #{agentId} order by last_message_at desc limit 100
